conventions.ticks: 1 tick = 1 game frame (60/s). Startup = hitbox start_tick (state tick when hitbox activates). IASA resolved: iasa_at<0 means anim_length+iasa_at (CharState.init).
conventions.menu_rule: a state is an action button iff show_in_menu && selectable && interrupt_from_string non-empty (BaseChar.gd init -> action_cancels; ActionButtons.gd)

moves.Notes: Idle 10 ticks. Universal.
anim_length 120, exits to Fall when rising ends; usable in All stances, resets stance to Normal. Fly can be engaged after leaving ground via extra options.
Robot version: projectile armor ticks 7-38, air movements restored to 3 at tick 8. Interrupt windows at ticks 15/28/42/60. Data: direction.
iasa 11 normally, 10 while flying (re-interruptible every 10 ticks during flight). Auto 'Landing' on touching ground.

Robot's dash replacement. Teleports forward 6px(t5)+15px(t6); trailing hitbox t9-13: 60 dmg, hits LOW, knockdown, second box hits OTG. +3 ticks startup lag when not in combo; reverse adds 2 ticks + penalty; beats backdash (non-reversed). Cannot be counterhit. interrupts into RETURN.
Hold-to-charge dash (endless); at tick 6 of release auto-fires ChargedStep: same as STEP but charged=true grants projectile armor and applies forces with no speed limit (force 15).
Only selectable immediately after STEP (Step interrupts into 'Return' category). Teleports backward 12px at tick 3.
Slide: sets ground friction to 0.2 for 20 ticks and applies forward force after tick 3. Drive-cancellable (HostCommand try_drive_cancel).
Fast jab; 3 overlapping hitboxes (all 55). Hitstun only 5 ticks.
Knockdown. Drive-cancellable on block (try_drive_cancel @ command tick).
Hard knockdown launcher. With initiative: skips ticks 3->5 (faster) and becomes self hit-cancellable. Drive-cancellable.
Single 1-tick burst (2 overlapping boxes), +1 on block. Drive-cancellable.
Long horizontal beam; 4 overlapping boxes, the last does 80. +1 on block. Drive-cancellable.
Multi-hit lariat t7-18. Aerial-attack invulnerability ticks 4-15 when used with initiative. Drive-cancellable.
Wind box ticks 0-15 pulls opponent toward Robot (force 0.45), then hit at t13. +2 on block.

Ground slam: quake hits LOW + OTG + knockdown. One quake box (Hitbox4, 80, followup EarthquakeThrow) is zeroed in code if legacy used_earthquake_grab flag is set (never in practice). Hitbox3 (75, mid, OTG) has start_tick=-1 and is never scheduled by the engine: dead box. Drive-cancellable.

moves.Resource: one flame pool at a time (can_flamethrower)
moves.Notes: Hits LOW, +1 on block. Spawns GroundFire pool at t11: 100px wide, burns grounded non-jumping opponent 2 dmg/tick for 120 ticks. Not reusable until pool expires.
Air kick, +2 on block, land-cancellable. 4 overlapping boxes: 2x50, 2x70.
Aerial version; knockdown (not hard), land-cancellable.
Air beam; land-cancellable; anim 31.
t8-9 main hit then t10-15 multihit; +3 on block; recoils backward-up on hit (force 6); land-cancellable.
Dive: from t3 sets velocity to 13 straight down (x*0.05); hitbox always_on from t4. Lands into Landing (triggers ground-pound landing shockwave if charged). +1 on block.

Hop + clap, knockdown, +3 on block. Custom gravity (0.58 grounded start / 0.80 air start). Data: Direction (x) and Auto (auto-chase with 4-tick loops, combo scaling 2). First use per combo: extra victim hitlag (+15), no ground bounce. Landing after clap = ClapLand (120 dmg hitbox t1-3 in that state).

Arm sweeps an arc between data Start and End angles at radius 48px; hitbox positions update per tick, knockback follows arc tangent. Looping 1on/1off, +3 on block; iasa_on_hit 19. Hitbox timing set in code (chainsaw_start_tick 10 -> active t11-20), overriding .tscn.
Standard grab -> Hold -> Forward/Back Throw. Throwbox beats_grab=false.
Air grab -> AirHold -> air throws. Land-cancel recovery 6.
Release tick 18, knockback 22, knockdown.
Release tick 18, knockback 22, knockdown.
Air-ground-bounces victim when used mid-combo.
Air-ground-bounces victim when used mid-combo.

moves.Damage: 90 per slam in combo / 147 per slam raw (2 slams via GroundSlam)
moves.Notes: Command grab; throw invuln t2-7; data = reverse. Throwbox -> GroundSlam: slams at f21 and f40 (hit applied directly via hitbox.hit()), hard knockdown, release f41.
COMBO ONLY version. Data false -> DisembowelGrabFollowup (hits t18/29/40, 70 each, release f41); data true -> TryCatchGroundSlam (single slam: 90 in combo / 140 raw, hard knockdown, iasa 56).
NEUTRAL ONLY version of TRY-CATCH; same followups.
Aerial unblockable grab (guard_break hitbox). -> OverflowFollowup: release f31, dmg 130, restores 1 air movement, kills fly. Land-cancel recovery 6, min land cancel frame 8.

Guard-break flying grab; projectile armor t0-15, flies forward (force 1.5/tick to t15). On grab -> CornerCarryHold: carries opponent toward corner (force 2/tick, max 240 ticks, only 20 in combo, releases 64px from wall) -> CornerCarryRelease: 180 dmg wall slam. Reversed raw use adds 25 penalty.
Aerial version of BOUNDS CHECK; same carry/release.
Enters Drive (motorcycle) stance. anim 20, iasa 10, interruptible on opponent turn.
Drive-stance only. Sit still on the bike (dir 0).

Drive-stance only. Accelerates (3.5/tick, no force limit, speed cap 20); always_on contact hitbox 60 dmg, knockdown, OTG, +1 on block; projectile armor t0-5. Hold continues; with drive_cancel extra ends in UnDriveCancel. Drive-cancellable on block.
Drive-stance only. Reverses at 2.0/tick (dir -1). Switching to Forward right after stalls 6 ticks and resets momentum.
Drive-stance only. Front wheel attack; +1 on block. Drive-cancellable.
Drive-stance only. Throwbox t6-10 -> DriveWheelieThrow: release f14, 120 dmg, launches up (dir_y -1), wall_slam, iasa 20.
Drive-stance only, EXITS Drive. Hits LOW, hard knockdown, +1 on block; projectile invulnerability t0-10; heavy x-friction slide.
Drive-stance only, EXITS Drive. Bike jump (data x = direction, vertical force up to -10); always_on hitbox 50 dmg +2; airborne until landing (interrupt at t20), custom grav 0.6.
Drive-stance LEVEL 1 SUPER. Invulnerable t1-6 with initiative; afterimages; spawns 60-tick LOIC-type ground fire (2 dmg/tick). Drive-cancellable.

Tosses grenade (data x/y direction, speed 10.5, from above or below). Inert grenade can be detonated any turn via 'DETONATE' extra (nade_activated) -> NadeExplosion: 120 dmg, knockdown, +3; optional bounce impulse (speed 10) before detonating. Grenade hitting/being blocked enables opponent magnetization.

moves.Resource: requires grenade out; magnet not already active
moves.Notes: Starts 100-tick magnet: pulls the grenade toward Robot (bomb pull strength ramps 0->1.0 by +0.1/tick); if the grenade hit or was blocked, also pulls the OPPONENT (strength 1.6, x0.75 if blocked; grounded opponents not pulled vertically). In combo, interruptible from tick 7. Magnet ends early when bomb arrives within 64px after 10+ ticks.

moves.Resource: air option bar: needs >=25%, drains ~8.3% per missile
moves.Notes: Fires 3 homing missiles (state tick loops back, one missile per cycle at projectile_tick 5). Missile hitbox 65 dmg, knockback 12. Listed in the Super menu category but costs no super bars.

Orbital laser. Usable only when can_loic (meter full AND >=2 bars) and no strike already out. Spawns sky marker over opponent (or self via cut Galvanize data); aim delay = 14 + Delay%*(85-14) ticks, then fires beam: hits HIGH, knockdown, OTG, combo scaling x2, active 120 ticks. Beam can be re-aimed each turn via LOIC direction extra (loic_dir). LOIC meter: starts 500, +5/tick (paused while strike active), drains on use.
Cancels the active orbital strike (only usable while one is out and not already deactivating).

Command grab super: throwbox t6-11 -> KillProcessSpin (carries up, custom grav) -> KillProcessLanding (damage scales with bars consumed; hitbox t1-4 there). The scene's extra 0-dmg Hitbox (start_tick 0) is never activated. At 9 bars raw it is an INSTANT KILL (level treated as 200 => 15150). Invulnerable t1-9 with initiative + projectile invuln; installs super armor on landing. Kills fly.
Standard block (NewParry, endless). Robot cannot perfect parry while flying.
Block variant offered after whiff cancel.
Blocks and pushes attacker away (hitbox t0-19, 0 dmg).
Counter vs high attacks (anim 60).
Counter vs low attacks.
Counter vs throws.
Roll dodge (RollDodge base; data = direction). Robot's version disables flight during it (can_fly=false).
Roll from knockdown.
Rise from knockdown.
Taunt; grounded anim 45 (air 11, holdable). Applies 'sadness' only outside combos; starts hustle FX.
Universal burst; hits OTG; Robot refill: bursting restores air option bar to max. Stops flight (HostCommand stop_flying).
Neutral-only burst.
Combo-only burst cancel; hits OTG.
Cancel current move after it HIT (hit_fighter_last or in combo); 1-tick state.
Cancel a whiffed move; unusable if parried/blocked. Enabling armor during it adds +2 armor startup ticks.

stances.name: Normal
stances.description: Default stance. Most moves require it (allowed_stances_string 'Normal') or allow 'All'.

stances.name: Drive
stances.description: Motorcycle stance entered via DRIVE (Special, grounded, iasa 10). While in Drive: IDLE/FORWARD/BACKWARD movement, WHEELIE, CLUTCH (grab), DRIFT (exits, low hard-knockdown), JUMPSTART (exits, airborne), BOOST (level-1 super). Exit via DRIFT/JUMPSTART, Jump/SuperJump (stance->Normal), drive-cancel mechanics, or universal All-stance moves. The drive_cancel extra option pre-arms a cancel: on block (on_attack_blocked) or at a move's HostCommand tick, try_drive_cancel switches stance via DriveCancel/UnDriveCancel (iasa 9) or FastDriveCancel (iasa 4). Moves carrying try_drive_cancel: Slap, EyeBeam, SideKick, Blast, Propel, GroundPound, Lariat, DriveWheelie, DriveBoost, DriveForward.

quirks: 1) NO standard mobility: Robot.tscn blanks interrupt_from_string on DashForward/DashBackward/DoubleJump/AirDash - he cannot dash, double-jump or airdash. Instead: STEP (teleporting hit-dash with RETURN followup), PROPEL slide, Drive stance, and FLIGHT. 2) FLIGHT: extra options supply fly_dir + fly_enabled each turn; flying lasts up to 25 ticks per activation, applies force 1.65 toward fly_dir (up-speed capped -6, forward cap 9, backward cap 5), drains air option bar 20/tick (bar 0 or grounding ends flight); flying backward/up adds penalty every 2 ticks; cannot perfect-parry while flying; blocked melee attack or getting hurt ends flight. Air option bar refills to min 80 + 3/tick grounded, +300/combo-divided on hit, full on burst. The same bar fuels LAUNCH missiles. 3) ARMOR PIPS: 1 pip max, regained by landing any move (when not in a hurt state); armor_enabled extra spends the pip to raise autoblock armor after 3 startup ticks (5 from whiff-cancel); getting hit while armored loses all pips and the armor; armor on a grab disables feinting; armor and magnet-pull extras are mutually exclusive. has_armor() also requires super_armor_installed (granted by KILL PROCESS landing). 4) LOIC meter: 1000 cap, starts 500, +5/tick except while an orbital strike is active; full meter + 2 super bars unlocks LOIC; SHUTDOWN cancels the strike; the strike marker is re-aimable every turn via loic_dir extra; projectile deactivates if Robot gets launched or grabbed. 5) GROUND POUND charge: rising above 48px (y < -48) while not hurt arms can_ground_pound (HUD indicator); next landing with fall speed > 5.0 gets a landing hitbox (damage = 0.3 * 10 * speed, min 10-ish) plus two LandingShockwave projectiles; consumed on grounding/blocked hit. 6) KILL PROCESS consumes ALL super bars (min 3) and at 9 bars in neutral is a scripted instant kill (level set to 200 -> 15150 damage). 7) REMOTE BOMB + MAGNETIZE form a puppet subsystem: one grenade, detonate/bounce via extras, magnet drags bomb (and the opponent, if the bomb touched them) toward Robot for 100 ticks. 8) Cut content still wired in: 'Galvanize' (self-targeted LOIC, selectable=false), 'EarthquakeThrow' and 'OverflowGrabOld' (selectable=false), DisembowelGrab base state, and the magnet_installed/pull_enabled extra path (magnet_installed is never set true). GroundPound's Hitbox4 checks used_earthquake_grab, which is unreachable.

unverified.reason: invulnerability windows live in RollDodge/Getup base class logic, not extracted as ticks
block/parry frame mechanics are in NewParry.gd runtime logic; only anim_length(20)/endless extracted
counter trigger windows and counter damage live in CounterAttack.gd, not extracted
multiple overlapping same-tick hitboxes with different damage (50/70, 55/80, 65/100); which body region maps to which value requires hitbox position data not extracted
hitbox start/active set in _ready from exported chainsaw_start_tick/end_tick (11..20 used here); .tscn raw values (0/5) are overridden at runtime; arc position fully dynamic
total state duration is dynamic (current_tick loops back per missile); listed IASA is per-cycle anim_length-1
charge-hold timing is endless; release data {x:100, charged:true} passed to ChargedStep; exact charge thresholds in Dash/ChargeDash base code
ticks-to-airborne and jump force live in states/Jump.gd base code; anim_length 120 is nominal

Hitbox4 (80) has active_ticks driven by code (0 if used_earthquake_grab else 3); Hitbox3 (75) has start_tick=-1 and the engine only schedules hitboxes with start_tick>0, so it never activates - excluded from Damage
damage computed at runtime from fall speed (0.3*round(speed/1.0*10)); LandingShockwave projectile damage also runtime-set
meter/'sadness' amounts are in base Taunt.gd, not extracted
Step node exports earliest_hitbox=11 while parsed hitbox start_tick=9; in-engine hitbox activation uses start_tick 9, the earliest_hitbox hint disagrees
